issues.sample: 4-6-14  UPON STARTING THE VEHICLE AND SHIFTING INTO DRIVE POSITION, THERE WAS NO AVAILABLE STEERING.  AN ALERT MESSAGE "SERVICE ADVANCED TRACK" APPEARED  SEVERAL ATTEMPTS TO RE-START HAD NO EFFECT  VEHICLE TOWED TO LOCAL FORD DEALERSHIP FOR REPAIR  4-9-14  DEALER ADVISED PROBLEM

narrative.headline: What 2014 Ford Taurus owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 233 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: 4-6-14  UPON STARTING THE VEHICLE AND SHIFTING INTO DRIVE POSITION, THERE WAS NO AVAILABLE STEERING.  AN ALERT MESSAGE "SERVICE ADVANCED TRACK" APPEARED  SEVERAL ATTEMPTS TO RE-START HAD NO EFFECT  VEHICLE TOWED TO LOCAL FORD DEALERSHIP FOR REPAIR  4-9-14  DEALER ADVISED PROBLEM
